subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The beloved ones must be educators of souls, nurturing them through spiritual attributes and conscientious attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: احبا باید مربی نفوس باشند نفوس را باخلاق روحانی و انجذاب وجدانی
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @call to action, @Satan; the Evil One, @education of children; moral education, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
